input.old_string:
@model_validator(mode="after")
    def image_to_base64(self) -> Self:
        """Store the image as base64 and guess the mimetype when possible.

        In case the model was built passing image data but without a mimetype,
        we try to guess it using the filetype library. To avoid resource-intense
        operations, we won't load the path or the URL to guess the mimetype.
        """
        if not self.image:
            return self

        if not self.image_mimetype:
            guess = filetype.guess(self.image)
            self.image_mimetype = guess.mime if guess else None

        self.image = base64.b64encode(self.image)

        return self
input.new_string:
@model_validator(mode="after")
    def image_to_base64(self) -> Self:
        """Store the image as base64 and guess the mimetype when possible.

        In case the model was built passing image data but without a mimetype,
        we try to guess it using the filetype library. To avoid resource-intense
        operations, we won't load the path or the URL to guess the mimetype.
        """
        if not self.image:
            return self

        self.get_image_mimetype()

        self.image = base64.b64encode(self.image)

        return self

    def get_image_mimetype(self) -> str | None:
        """Lazily resolve and cache the mimetype of the image.

        If `image_mimetype` is already set, it's returned as-is. Otherwise, this
        guesses the mimetype from the raw image bytes using the filetype library
        and caches the result on `image_mimetype` for subsequent calls.
        """
        if self.image_mimetype:
            return self.image_mimetype

        if self.image:
            guess = filetype.guess(self.image)
            self.image_mimetype = guess.mime if guess else None

        return self.image_mimetype

content.text: Added `ImageBlock.get_image_mimetype()` in `llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py`, which lazily guesses and caches the MIME type, and refactored `image_to_base64` to delegate to it instead of duplicating the guessing logic. Verified behavior manually and confirmed the existing `test_types.py` suite (12 tests) still passes. Diff written to `/workspace/repo/patch.txt`.

result: Added `ImageBlock.get_image_mimetype()` in `llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py`, which lazily guesses and caches the MIME type, and refactored `image_to_base64` to delegate to it instead of duplicating the guessing logic. Verified behavior manually and confirmed the existing `test_types.py` suite (12 tests) still passes. Diff written to `/workspace/repo/patch.txt`.
